source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Other Lifting

event.top_event: Fire on Glycol Reboiler vent line
actions_taken: Facility shut in due to Level Safety Low on Glycol Surge Tank
Water hose with potable water used to extinguish fire
Still column sent for thorough cleaning
Perforated plate to be replaced with expanded metal
event.summary: On January 29, 2024 at approximately 1745 hours, a fire occurred on the Glycol Reboiler vent line at Cantium LLC facility in South Timbalier Block 23. The facility had shut in due to a Level Safety Low alarm on the Glycol Surge Tank. While operators were adding glycol to the system, a flame was observed coming from the Pressure Safety Valve vent line when the valve relieved pressure. The fire was extinguished using potable water. The probable cause was determined to be human error during reassembly of the still column following October 2023 maintenance, where the packing section was not reinstalled properly, removing the ability to preheat glycol and allow entrained gases to be released.
recommendations: Send still column back for thorough cleaning
Replace perforated metal plate with expanded metal in packing section to improve flow

hazards.name: Pressurized glycol system with entrained gases

threats.name: Improper reassembly of still column packing section
Inadequate cleaning of still column after maintenance
Pressure Safety Valve relief of pressurized gas mixture

consequences.name: Fire on Glycol Reboiler vent line

controls.name: Pressure Safety Valve on Glycol Reboiler
controls.barrier_role: Relieves excess pressure to prevent rupture

supporting_text: a flame was noticed coming from the Pressure Safety Valve (PSV) vent line for the Glycol Reboiler (BBC 201) when the valve relieved pressure

controls.name: Still column packing section for glycol preheating
controls.barrier_role: Preheats glycol to allow entrained gases to be released before pressurization

supporting_text: the packing section was not reinstalled in the still column
Without the packing section, it removes the ability to preheat the glycol which allows for entrained gases to be released into the Reboiler
Human error- Packing section was not reinstalled properly

controls.name: Level Safety Low alarm on Glycol Surge Tank
controls.barrier_role: Detects low glycol level and triggers facility shutdown

supporting_text: At approximately 1730, the facility shut in due to a Level Safety Low (LSL) on the Glycol Surge Tank (ABJ 102)

controls.name: Maintenance and reassembly procedures for still column
controls.barrier_role: Ensures proper reinstallation of packing section and cleaning after maintenance

supporting_text: In October of 2023, the still column of the Reboiler was sent in to a construction yard for repair
Once returned, Cantium construction crew reassembled the unit
The clog appears to be due to the still column not being cleaned enough
Cantium crews then proceeded to disassemble the still column and removed the 1" ceramic saddles

controls.name: Manual fire suppression response
controls.barrier_role: Extinguishes fire using water to prevent escalation

supporting_text: At approximately 1900 hours, operators from GI 37 R arrived by boat
At 2000 hours, a plan was made to put a water hose with potable water in the top of still column to put the fire out which was successful

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
